song_details.name: VaraVeena
song_details.arohanam: S R2 G3 P D2 S
song_details.avarohanam: S D2 P G3 R2 S

content.swara: G G      | P , P  , | D        P   || S , S ,  ||
Va        ra       | vee - na       -  | Mru     du   ||        Pa      - ni    -             ||
content.sahitya: You are the queen ("raani") of the omniscient. Your eyes ("lochana") are like the lotus petals

content.swara: R S      | D D P  , | D        P     || G G R ,        ||
Va     na         |  ru      ha Lo     - | cha             na     || Raa      - ni    -             ||
content.sahitya: Your curly ("suruchira") tresses ("veni") resemble the bees ("bambhara").

content.swara: G P      | D S D   , | D       P     || G G R ,  ||
Su        ru        | chi ra Bam - | bha           ra     || Ve      - ni    -       ||

Su  ra      | nu tha Kal     -    | ya          -           || -       - ni     -      ||
G G      | G G R  G | P                  G     ||  P , P ,  ||
Ni         ru       | pa ma Shu  bha  | Gu                na     ||  Lo      - la    -        ||
G G      | D P D      , | D                  P     ||   S , S ,  ||
Ni        ra         | thi Ja ya     -     | Pra                da     || See      - la    -        ||
content.sahitya: You are Ranganaayaki,  the consort ("priya")of the Ranganatha ("varadaa").

content.swara: D G      | R R S  S | D                  S     ||  D D D P    ||
Va       ra         | da - Pri    ya    | Ran                ga     || naa      - ya    ki       ||
content.sahitya: You grant ("daayaki") the boons ("phala") desired ("vaanchita") by your devotees.

content.swara: G P      | D S D  P | D                  P     || G G R S  ||
Vaa      -         | nchitha Pha  la | Daa                  -     ||  -      - ya    ki        ||
content.sahitya: O Mother ("janani") of Brahma, who is seated on a lotus ("saraseeja-asana")!
